goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 dogfood health 只读总览

summary.title: 增加 Catty v0 dogfood health 只读总览
summary.what: 新增 src/catty/dogfood-health.ts 和测试，把 persisted daily report、memory candidate dry-run、canary dry-run/queue/eval、accepted-memory dogfood status 组合成一个 dry-run readiness 总览；同时更新 src/catty/README.md 的命令索引和边界说明。
summary.why: accepted-memory dogfood status 只覆盖链路后半段。这个入口让后续 agent 能一眼看到 v0 从 prediction/judge/report 到 candidate/canary/accepted-memory tail 的当前缺口和 blockers，更接近真实 dogfood 操作面。
summary.user_goal: 给 Catty v0 增加 dogfood health 只读总览

decisions.point: health 总览是否写入任何状态
decisions.chose: 保持完全 dry-run/read-only，只组合现有 report/candidate/canary/status 接口并拒绝 --write
decisions.rationale: 本轮目标是可观测性和诊断，不是推进 memory 转正；这样不会污染 user memory、catty_memory_audit、canary status 或 apply receipts。
rejected: 在 health 中自动推进 canary 或 receipt apply

decisions.chose: 输出 ready_for_dogfood_review 或 blocked，并把 blockers 标到 daily_report、memory_candidates、memory_canary_*、accepted_memory.* stage
decisions.rationale: stage 化 blockers 能指导下一轮最小切片，同时避免把 hit-rate 或单一状态当成产品目标。

rejected.reason: 那会继续只关注 accepted-memory tail，无法覆盖 report、candidate、canary 前半段 readiness。

review_notes: 实际提交 4919751 只包含 src/catty/dogfood-health.ts、src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts、src/catty/README.md；prepare 输出中的大量文件来自 catty 分支相对 main 的既有 proposed 栈。
验证：bun test src/catty/dogfood-health.test.ts 3 pass；bun test src/catty/*.test.ts 60 pass；bun test 65 pass；git diff --check 和 git diff --cached --check 均通过。
CLI smoke：--help 正常；--write 退出 2 并拒绝；坏 --receipt-json 退出 2；live summary 在 2026-05-27 返回 blocked，原因是当前 live DB 没有 Catty predictions/judgements/canary queue。
Runtime live status 单次探测 ok=true，observe ok，full pipeline 因 30 分钟节流 skipped；并行误跑的一次 status 命中过 lock，已用单次探测校正。
CLAUDE.md 仍是无关 unstaged dirty，未 stage、未提交；seal 使用 --allow-dirty 只记录该边界。

architectural_claims: Dogfood health is a read-only composition layer over existing Catty v0 dry-run/list/read APIs.
Readiness/blockers are diagnostics for v0 dogfood, not a new product north star or automatic promotion mechanism.
behavioral_changes: Adds inspectCattyDogfoodHealth(...) to summarize report, memory candidates, canary planning/evaluation, accepted-memory tail, blockers, and safety boundary.
Adds CLI bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts with --date, --store-db, --receipt-json, --writer, and --max options; --write is rejected.

api_changes.signature: bun src/catty/dogfood-health.ts [--date YYYY-MM-DD] [--store-db PATH] [--receipt-json JSON] [--writer NAME] [--max 5]

security_implications: No secrets are read or emitted beyond existing store paths; --receipt-json is caller-provided and parsed only for dry-run verification.
No user memory, catty_memory_audit, canary status, apply receipt, model provider, heartbeat, or nightly runner side effect is performed.
migration_notes: No migration required; the health path does not create missing Catty tables.
